meta.title: Study Focus · D Dorian · Koto & Wind

composer.loop_safety_note: Stable harmonic centre on D. Sparse non-repeating koto motifs with long silences between phrases — no hook that can be hummed, nothing that becomes a tic on the 50th loop. Mid-texture start and end, no fade-in or fade-out. Wind layer is continuous and non-rhythmic. Safe to loop 100+ times for an 8-hour YouTube video.
composer.listener_context: students and focus workers wearing earbuds for 2–8 hour study sessions
composer.rationale: D Dorian's warm modal quality provides tonal colour without emotional narrative; koto's sparse phrasing gives the ear a gentle foreground anchor without creating a recognisable melody; wind through trees covers the loop seam and maintains the bamboo-forest atmosphere without time-of-day cues.

suno.style_of_music: study music, koto with warm analog pad, wind through trees, D Dorian mode, 70 BPM, no crescendo, no climax, warm hall reverb, lush and atmospheric, sparse non-repeating koto motifs, long silences between phrases, no vocals, no percussion, no drums, continuous ambient texture, no intro, no outro, mid-texture start, mid-texture end, stable harmonic centre, loop-friendly
suno.title: Study Focus · D Dorian · Koto & Wind
suno.exclude_styles: vocals, lyrics, singing, choir words, percussion, drums, beat, kick, snare, hi-hat, bass guitar, electric guitar, distortion, brass, trumpet, saxophone, climax, drop, build-up, crescendo, EDM, pop, rock, hip hop, lo-fi beats, jazz swing, dramatic strings, trailer music, dubstep, trap, sudden volume change, hard pan, sharp transient, sibilance, white noise hiss
